title: dysoxylum multifoliolatum
intro: Dysoxylum multifoliolatum, also known as the Philippine kwano or kwano, is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dysoxylum multifoliolatum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit hepatoprotective effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into tea, infusions, or tinctures, which are used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
